title: Drainage district purposes
doc_html:
§558.  Drainage district purposes

The governing authorities of drainage and sub-drainage districts may incur debt and issue negotiable bonds of the districts to construct gravity drainage works for the districts or sub-districts, and for no other purpose.  The title to the works shall be in the public.
doc_text:
§558.  Drainage district purposes
The governing authorities of drainage and sub-drainage districts may incur debt and issue negotiable bonds of the districts to construct gravity drainage works for the districts or sub-districts, and for no other purpose.  The title to the works shall be in the public.
